comments.author: @robertjmckinley
comments.text: Thank you Rick!  I am watching your video on Laos from Luang Prabang and just booked 3 more days. Just did a slow boat from Huoixai which was fabulous.   The video is superb!  Don’t wait too long to going through your list although you can always do it. I am 77! Bob

comments.author: @pattyrrell4624
comments.text:
So are these documentaries AI generated? I was watching the one about Chernobyl, and in one part about the wolves that have re-established themselves, I saw a wolf start to walk away....and it showed that it was on a leash. And the point of view was far too close to the wild animals...and far too perfect. Even with long distance lenses, I would think the film quality wouldn't be as crisp and sharp as it is shown.

If this is a generated film, do us all a favour and at least acknowledge that fact publicly. I'm sure the information is correct, especially about the flora and fauna and how nature is thriving in the area. There are obviously official reports from the inspectors who rotate through the zones.....but don't pass this off as a film piece.

comments.author: @joepoore6874
comments.text: too bad the AI couldn't be troubled to find a single image of the beautiful, unique Cucumber Tree, instead showing worthless B roll of domestic cucumber vines. Still, some useful info.
